raw_job_description:
DevOps Engineer
Mission: automate deployments, improve infrastructure reliability and maintain CI/CD pipelines. The role involves Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, Linux and GitHub Actions. At least 4 years of experience. Contract position, hybrid in Paris. French and English are a plus.
